specific_mechanism: LP-Gate: at each decode step, solve small LP over candidate tokens with K active constraints; extract dual variables y_t,k as per-constraint gating weights; adjust logits by Σ y_t,k g_k(z).
llm_application: LP-Gate decoding rule: at each decode step, build relaxed LP over top-T candidate tokens with K=4 constraints (length-remaining, must-include-token-coverage, banned-token-soft-budget, complete-by-step-T budget). Solve LP in O(K T) via revised simplex. Extract dual variables y_k. Logits adjusted: logits_z ← logits_z - Σ_k y_k g_k(z), softmax then sample.
novelty_claim: Primal-Dual DPO (arXiv 2510.05703) uses Lagrangian for alignment fine-tuning; CRANE constrained generation. LP-Gate as per-step decode LP with dual variables specifically is less common.
motivation_justification: LP duality theorem is exact algebraic identity; dual variables ARE constraint Lagrangians. Direct transfer to decode-step logit adjustment.
sub_mechanisms: M_1: Top-T LP relaxation per decode step
M_4: Logit adjustment ← Σ y_k g_k
content_words: revised simplex small LP solve per step
logit adjustment soft gating decode step
LP duality decode step LLM transformer
